title: SystemVerilog support enhancement request (vector width coercion)
body:
---


Author Name: **Ed Lander**
Original Redmine Issue: 628 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2013-03-05
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Hi,

There's a very useful syntax in SystemVerilog that helps the coder explicitly state whether values are to be sign/zero extended or truncated at assignment: length casts of the form <n>'(expr).

Here's an explicit example:
```
module width_warnings ();
 
reg [15:0] a, b, c;
 
assign a = 16'(b + c);
 
endmodule

```

We would like Verilator to supported this.

Cheers,
Ed
